titleStmt.title: SII 40.27: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 27. (A.R. No. B. 6 of 1930.) Juttāḍa, Viravalli Taluk, Vizagapatam District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in front of the Veṅkatēśvara temple.
This is dated in King's 3rd regnal year, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkrānti, Thursday.

Records the grant of land by Bhīmi-seṭṭi, son of Prōli-seṭṭi of Sādāpuram for a burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of the goddess Vindhyavāsini of Duttāḍa for the merit of Mastya family. This inscription contains the praśasti of the Matsya family that contains reference to Kāsyapa gōtra, lord of Mūkundagiri, Mallapa-triṇētra, samasta-rājāśraya, satya-mārttaṇḍa etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata nimmala matsyakulatilaka mu
kuṁdagirinātha kāśyapagōtranāṣaggamahati
ṣānvaya timilapaḍapupaṇa mallapa triṇē
tra śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara samasta rājāśraya
satyamā¨rttaṇḍa kalikāla dha¨rmmajaraṇa raṁggarā
ghava śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara bhīmarājula pra
va¨rddhamāna vijayarājya saṁvatsaraṁbulu 3
ṇdagu śrāhinuttarāyana saṁkrāṁtiyu bṛhaspati
vāramunāṇḍu sādāpuramuna prōliseṭṭi koḍu
ku bhīmiseṭṭi ḍuttāḍaviṁdhyavāsiki juttāḍa polamu
na proṁtasariyalōpalaṁ beddapuṭṭiyiriviḍinē
larājulacēta vilcikoni yakhaṁḍadīpamuna
ku nācaṁ¨rdrākkasthāyigā nicenidi matsyavaṁśamu
na rājula dha¨rmmavu dīniki nēvvarēni vilōmamu sēya
dalaṁccinavāru gaṁggakaṟavēyu(yi)kavulalanu vē
vuru brahmaṇalanu vadhiyiṁcci tana peddakoḍu
ku kapālamunaṁ guḍicina dōṣamunaṁ bōvaṁgga
lavāṇḍutthammayākṛtaṁ dha¨rmmaṁ yōnyadhā
ka¨rttumudyatassabrahmahāsurāpaścagōṣnu
ścaivakṛ taghnakaḥ
Digital edition of SII 40.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
